timeline.description: Pirates arrive in Puddleford. The sea is not nearby. This has not deterred them.
The interwar years come to Puddleford.
Cars, flares, and something going very fast through Puddleford.
Not the 1980s in general. 1983 in particular.
Something has been released in Puddleford.
The millennium has arrived. Puddleford adapts, imperfectly.
Something is watching. Puddleford carries on regardless.

timeline.episode: Where No Duck Has Gone Before
timeline.description: The far future. Puddleford has, somehow, made it to space.
A frontier town bearing a suspicious resemblance to Puddleford.

timeline.episode: The Fellowship of the Dog and Duck
timeline.description: A fantasy realm. The Dog and Duck still exists.

locations.name: The Dog and Duck
locations.description: Puddleford's enduring public house. Present in every era. The ale is always questionable.

locations.name: Puddleford Bridge
locations.description: The cobbled stone bridge at the heart of town, spanning the River Pudd.

locations.name: Puddleford Manor
locations.description: The grand stately home on the hill. Seat of the local gentry.

locations.name: Puddleford General Hospital
locations.description: Also known as the Irrational Health Service.
